sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ لَيْلَى أَنْ تُرْسِلَ رِسَالَةً إِلَى صَدِيقَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Lejla je htjela poslati poruku prijateljici.
sentences.translationEn: Layla wanted to send a message to her friend.

sentences.translation: Otvorila je aplikaciju i napisala poruku.
sentences.translationEn: She opened the app and wrote the message.

sentences.translation: Dodala je lijepu fotografiju uz poruku.
sentences.translationEn: She added a beautiful photo with the message.

sentences.translation: Pritisnula je pošalji i čekala odgovor.
sentences.translationEn: She pressed send and waited for the reply.
